import { Entity, PrimaryKey, Property, ManyToOne, OneToMany, Collection } from '@mikro-orm/core';
import { Book } from './book.entity';

@Entity()
export class Author {
  @PrimaryKey()
  id!: number;

  @Property()
  name!: string;

  @Property({ unique: true })
  email!: string;

  @ManyToOne(() => Publisher)
  publisher!: Publisher;

  @OneToMany(() => Book, (book) => book.author)
  books = new Collection<Book>(this);
}
